callback_message: Open a Route Plan and use the Route table (Territories) to assign geographic areas or customer segments to the route.
description: Use the **Route Plan Territory** child table within each Route Plan to define which geographic areas or customer segments each route covers. Multiple territories can be assigned per plan.
name: Assign Territories
title: Assign Territories to Routes

description: Create todo activity types to categorize tasks for your sales team. Examples include Client Visit, Product Demo, Follow Up, Contract Signing, and Site Survey.
name: Create Activity Type
title: Set Up Activity Types

callback_message: Open a Route Plan and use the Salesmen table to assign sales representatives to the route. Each rep can be linked to specific days for efficient territory management.
description: Assign sales representatives to route plans and manage their daily schedules. Each rep can be linked to specific days and routes for efficient territory management.
name: Manage Sales Rep Routes
title: Manage Sales Rep Routes

description: Define a route plan with territories, operating days, and assigned sales representatives. Route Plans form the backbone of your sales operations by organizing coverage areas and schedules.
name: Create Route Plan
title: Create Your First Route Plan
